common.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This platform provides AI-generated information for educational purposes and is not a substitute for professional legal advice.

hero.headline: PocketLawyer – Your AI Legal Assistant in Your Pocket
hero.subheadline: Generate legal complaints, understand complex laws, and research court cases instantly using advanced AI.

problem.headline: The Legal Challenge in India
problem.subheadline: Navigating the Indian legal system can be overwhelming. With millions of cases pending and complex procedures, many citizens feel helpless.
problem.stat1: India registers over 6.2 million crimes annually
problem.stat2: More than 17,000 crimes are reported daily
problem.stat3: Thousands struggle with drafting formal complaints
problem.stat4: Lack of affordable legal guidance for common issues

features.headline: Powerful AI Features
features.subheadline: Our modular AI system is designed to provide specific assistance for different legal needs.

feat1.title: AI Complaint Generator
feat1.description: Generate police complaints and legal applications automatically with professional formatting.

feat2.title: Legal Guidance AI
feat2.description: Understand relevant laws (IPC/BNS) and get clear steps for your specific legal situation.

feat3.title: AI Case Research
feat3.description: Search similar cases and landmark court judgments to strengthen your legal understanding.

feat4.title: Document Templates
feat4.description: Access pre-formatted legal documents and templates for various Indian legal requirements.

feat5.title: AI Powered Chatbot
feat5.description: Ask legal questions and receive instant AI-powered responses for your concerns.

emergency.headline: Know Your Rights & Emergency Help
emergency.subheadline: In case of emergency, use these official Government of India helpline numbers. Citizen safety is our priority.

cta.headline: Ready to simplify your legal journey?
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of citizens using PocketLawyer to access justice more efficiently.

about.title: About PocketLawyer
about.subtitle: PocketLawyer aims to democratize legal access in India using artificial intelligence. We believe that every citizen deserves to understand their rights and have the tools to seek justice.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To bridge the gap between complex legal systems and the common citizen through intuitive AI tools.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A future where legal assistance is as accessible as a mobile app, empowering 1.4 billion Indians.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Trust, accessibility, and integrity are at the core of everything we build at PocketLawyer.

why.title: Why PocketLawyer?
why.description: In India, legal awareness is often a privilege. PocketLawyer changes that by providing instant, accurate, and easy-to-understand legal support. Whether you're a student, a professional, or a citizen in need, we're here to help you navigate the law.

metadata.title: PocketLawyer – Your AI Legal Assistant in Your Pocket
metadata.description: Generate legal complaints, understand laws, and research cases instantly using AI. Support for multiple Indian languages.
